sessions.title: VINYASA FLOW
sessions.details: Vinyasa flow yoga is a dynamic practice rooted in Ashtanga yoga principles, where poses are linked together to form one fluid sequence of movement. Benefits include cardiovascular health, strength building, a wide range of motion, stress relief, flexibility and connection with breath.   Expect to move from pose to pose in a creative sequence that changes every time, and often with a musical background. Some classes will be more vigorous and challenging than others depending on the teacher, who each bring their own influences, so do try them all or contact us for guidance.

sessions.title: ProDance class with Peter Butler
sessions.details: A physical class consisting of a full body warm up and guided improvisation tasks followed by a short phrase incorporating the elements explored at the start of class into choreography. The aim of the class is to feel connected to your full body. Encouraging curiosity in how your breath, weight and emotion affect your physicality.

sessions.title: PHYSIO YOGA - PAY WHAT YOU CAN
sessions.details: This class is a movement meditation weaving principles of strength, motor control and proprioceptive training into intelligent yoga sequencing. Every month we will focus on a different region of the body combining sound anatomical knowledge & mindful practice to achieve efficient & graceful movement. Each vibrant flow is thoughtfully composed to allow for progressions, alternatives and modifications to promote health, wellbeing and a sense of vitality for all participants. No experience needed, all welcome.

sessions.title: VINYASA FLOW
sessions.details: Vinyasa flow yoga is a dynamic practice rooted in Ashtanga yoga principles, where poses are linked together to form one fluid sequence of movement. Benefits include cardiovascular health, strength building, a wide range of motion, stress relief, flexibility and connection with breath.   Expect to move from pose to pose in a creative sequence that changes every time, and often with a musical background. Some classes will be more vigorous and challenging than others depending on the teacher, who each bring their own influences, so do try them all or contact us for guidance.

Some classes will be more vigorous and challenging than others depending on the teacher, who each bring their own influences, so do try them all or contact us for guidance.

sessions.title: PILATES FLOW
sessions.details: Pilates Flow is a dynamic blend of Pilates, mobility exercises, and yoga flow sequences, all synchronized with the breath. This class aims to enhance strength, flexibility, and overall body awareness, providing a holistic workout that leaves you feeling balanced and revitalized.

sessions.title: YOGA for over 50s
sessions.details: Classes involve simple sequences of movements aiming at building strength and balance while keeping you connected to breath and intention.

sessions.title: VINYASA
sessions.details: Power Vinyasa Yoga is a vigorous, strong approach to the vinyasa yoga practice. Expect a full-body strong flow, arm balances, conditioning exercises as well as deep openers.

sessions.title: FLOW & GONG
sessions.details: The ultimate way to flow, relax, and glow. First stretch out and strengthen up with a dynamic vinyasa practice that links breath to movement, and really gets you moving. Inspired on rocket yoga, sequences are energising, inspiring, sometimes hilarious – and with optional balances & inversions to get the heart pumping. Next the pace drops as you move into deeper, more restorative poses and calming breathwork – before full sensory submersion in a 30-minute gong bath. Lie back and let the healing vibrations lead you into a state of contemplation, relaxation, and positivity. You'll leave glowing for sure!

sessions.title: CONTEMPORARY DANCE
sessions.details: Nicola’s teaching philosophy centers on fostering an inclusive, safe space for students to explore their creativity and connect with others. She emphasizes presence, adaptability, and self-expression while encouraging students to embrace challenges and build confidence in their artistry. Through her classes, Nicola seeks to inspire boldness, community, and joy in movement. This all-level class invites participants to explore movement improvisation, flow, and groove. Structured exercises and physical sequences focus on bold, dynamic choices and artistry, blending elements of soft acrobatics, floorwork, classical dance techniques, and yoga.

sessions.title: VINYASA FLOW
sessions.details: Vinyasa flow yoga is a dynamic practice rooted in Ashtanga yoga principles, where poses are linked together to form one fluid sequence of movement. Benefits include cardiovascular health, strength building, a wide range of motion, stress relief, flexibility and connection with breath.   Expect to move from pose to pose in a creative sequence that changes every time, and often with a musical background. Some classes will be more vigorous and challenging than others depending on the teacher, who each bring their own influences, so do try them all or contact us for guidance.

sessions.title: VINYASA FLOW 90
sessions.details: Ann has been teaching a soft, creative style of Vinyasa Flow across London for over 10 years. Her original teacher training was 500 hours BWY with Danny DeVille. She has since sought out wisdom from many wonderful teachers- including Jason Crandell adding texture and depth to this foundation. Her interest in how the body moves is largely influenced by her work in dance, whereas the breathing, asana and esoteric elements stem from her education in Yoga and its rich history of ideas and styles.

sessions.title: DYNAMIC VINYASA
sessions.details: Dynamic Vinyasa flow yoga is a dynamic practice rooted in Ashtanga yoga principles, where poses are link together to form one fluid sequence of movement. Benefits include cardiovascular health, strength building, a wide range of motion, stress relief, flexibility and connection with breath. Expect to move from pose to pose in a creative sequence that changes every time, and often with a musical background. Some classes will be more vigorous and challenging than others depending on the teacher, who each bring their own influences, so do try them all or contact us for guidance.

sessions.title: COMMUNITY VINYASA FLOW with YTT course Graduates
sessions.details: Join our newly graduate teachers for an hour of creative and intelligently sequenced Vinyasa Flow. Hot from the graduation press, our 2025 Yoga Teacher Training cohort will hold space in rotation to practice their teaching skills and launch their careers. Each teacher will share their unique teaching style patiently and excitingly developed throughout our course under the trusty guide of lead teachers Ann Pidcock and Roberto Rubalcava. Classes will be devised to be layered and accessible: all are welcome, plenty of modifications will be offered. Come and meet this new generation of lovely and creative teachers! Classes are £5.

sessions.title: The Expressive Body Workshop
sessions.details: Laura Workshop is inspired by the body’s Chakra points, using them to initiate acrobatic and emotive movement. The session focuses on the connection between the head, spine, and tailbone, creating a serpentine flow that enhances movement fluidity. Her approach explores the contrast between gathering and sending, high and low, as well as emotionally driven movement and functional movement patterns. Drawing from 30 years of experience in dance and a growing curiosity in martial arts, Laura integrates a highly physical and expressive movement language into her teaching. Her practice challenges dancers to embrace both technical precision and emotional depth, fostering a dynamic and immersive experience.

sessions.title: DYNAMIC VINYASA
sessions.details: Dynamic Vinyasa flow yoga is a dynamic practice rooted in Ashtanga yoga principles, where poses are link together to form one fluid sequence of movement. Benefits include cardiovascular health, strength building, a wide range of motion, stress relief, flexibility and connection with breath. Expect to move from pose to pose in a creative sequence that changes every time, and often with a musical background. Some classes will be more vigorous and challenging than others depending on the teacher, who each bring their own influences, so do try them all or contact us for guidance.

sessions.title: PREGNANCY VINYASA FLOW
sessions.details: This class is an active yoga practice for mums-to-be throughout their second and third trimesters. The poses are safely adapted to encourage strength, flexibility, balance and ease. The class has a steady pace with plenty of options for all levels of experience and also includes breathing techniques and deep relaxation, both of which are so vital to support and nourish the mother and growing baby. *Please note that you need to be 13 weeks pregnant to begin the classes.

sessions.title: AMBIENT DANCE
sessions.details: How can we nourish our creative seeds as dancers and artists? Combining contact improvisation, journaling, floorwork and butoh-inspired scores, this 2-hour workshop offers space to re-focus and develop your creative ideas. Led by choreographer and dance theatremaker Billy Maxwell Taylor, you will meet a quiet humming energy throughout, both giving the body care during Spring and offering vital space to develop your dreams. Billy calls this the cultivation of tranquility and vitality. Ambient Dance is not a flashy technique, but a soft philosophy that allows us to meet the dance of life with care and warmth. The turning of leaves. The sparkling of city lights. The tidying of our homes. The expansion of our lungs. Whether you are a dancer, a physical theatre performer, a choreographer, a yoga practitioner or an artist curious in movement, this session will facilitate your experience with deep listening and consideration. We'll also have some deliciously brewed coffee and biscuits.

sessions.title: DYNAMIC VINYASA
sessions.details: Dynamic Vinyasa flow yoga is a dynamic practice rooted in Ashtanga yoga principles, where poses are link together to form one fluid sequence of movement. Benefits include cardiovascular health, strength building, a wide range of motion, stress relief, flexibility and connection with breath. Expect to move from pose to pose in a creative sequence that changes every time, and often with a musical background. Some classes will be more vigorous and challenging than others depending on the teacher, who each bring their own influences, so do try them all or contact us for guidance.

sessions.title: YIN & SOUND
sessions.details: Yin yoga uses long-held relaxed floor postures to stimulate, stretch and nourish body and mind - in particular, the deep, connective tissues of the body. It is a quiet, yet profound practice and derives from theories contained in Chinese medicine and Taoism. These theories have parallels with other yoga traditions. The aim of yin yoga is to create a free-flow of energy (‘chi’ or, in Indian yoga tradition, ‘prana’) through the body. The body’s deep tissues carry most of our fluid systems and by stimulating them and creating spaciousness around them with sustained yoga postures we improve the function of all our fundamental systems. Gradual and sustained lengthening throughout the body's joints and tissues improves the circulation, respiration, detoxification and benefits both mobility and agility. Yin practice focuses on ‘stillness’ in holding poses to achieve these physical benefits but also invites the mind to ease and tune-in with deeper awareness to the subtle shifts of energy experienced as the body tissues release. This can be a very rewarding and energizing process! * in order to receive the full benefits of the sound healing, we recommend attending this class in person as we cannot guarantee the quality of the sound online

sessions.title: VINYASA FLOW
sessions.details: Vinyasa flow yoga is a dynamic practice rooted in Ashtanga yoga principles, where poses are linked together to form one fluid sequence of movement. Benefits include cardiovascular health, strength building, a wide range of motion, stress relief, flexibility and connection with breath.   Expect to move from pose to pose in a creative sequence that changes every time, and often with a musical background. Some classes will be more vigorous and challenging than others depending on the teacher, who each bring their own influences, so do try them all or contact us for guidance.

sessions.title: ProDance class with Sophie Ormiston
sessions.details: Sophie's practise and movement language places focus on the articulation and availability of the entirety of the spine to create a sense of fluidity within the body. Together we will research ‘importance’ within movement through improvisation and some set phrases. We will explore how we can make the small and mundane important through our commitment to movement by noticing and harnessing sensation. Whilst using these elements as a way into soft, fluid full bodied physicality we will contrastingly explore how we can make dance less serious, silly and somewhat unimportant. Through the use of abstract visual references and tasks we will find ways into different dynamics and qualities that not only involve the body but also the face and voice. Each day the structure and content of my class will change with some things remaining consistent. Often including meditation, improvisation, phrases, crossings as well as voice and breathwork.

sessions.title: DYNAMIC VINYASA

sessions.title: YANG TO YIN
sessions.details: This class will flow through the energies of Yang into Yin. The first half will be focused on dynamic vinyasa-style asana to connect with and work the physical body through strong postures, an awareness of breath, a deep connection to sensation and body-mindfulness. The second half is designed to stimulate the parasympathetic nervous system with long floor-based postures, supported by meditation and mindfulness techniques to calm, ground and reset.

sessions.title: VINYASA
sessions.details: This Vinyasa Yoga class offers a dynamic, breath-led practice that builds strength, mobility and ease in the body. Movement flows smoothly from one posture to the next, linking breath with mindful transitions to create a continuous, energising sequence. Expect a balanced mix of standing postures, core work, creative sequencing and grounding stretches, with options offered to support different levels of experience. Classes may vary in pace and intensity, inviting both challenge and softness, while encouraging awareness, presence and connection. Suitable for those with some experience of yoga, as well as confident beginners looking to explore a flowing practice, this class leaves you feeling centred, uplifted and reconnected, both on and off the mat.

sessions.title: ProDance class with Sophie Ormiston
sessions.details: Sophie's practise and movement language places focus on the articulation and availability of the entirety of the spine to create a sense of fluidity within the body. Each day the structure and content of my class will change with some things remaining consistent. Often including meditation, improvisation, phrases, crossings as well as voice and breathwork.

sessions.title: BAMBU BODIES
sessions.details: Bambu Bodies is a mixed movement class inspired by the Capoeira practice. The class begins with a set sequence to help with conditioning before moving onto movement inquiries involving anything from floorwork and rhythm, to partner-work, to proprioceptive tasks and practices, developing strength, mobility, and co-ordination on the way.

sessions.title: VINYASA FLOW
sessions.details: Vinyasa flow yoga is a dynamic practice rooted in Ashtanga yoga principles, where poses are linked together to form one fluid sequence of movement. Benefits include cardiovascular health, strength building, a wide range of motion, stress relief, flexibility and connection with breath.   Expect to move from pose to pose in a creative sequence that changes every time, and often with a musical background. Some classes will be more vigorous and challenging than others depending on the teacher, who each bring their own influences, so do try them all or contact us for guidance.

sessions.title: ROCKET
sessions.details: Rocket is deeply rooted in Ashtanga. It is a series of standing, balancing and inverted postures all linked by vinyasas (movement flows), incorporating basic poses with challenging arm balances, inversions and back bends Inversions are lot of fun, but they also prove to be some of the most challenging postures. Some of the upside down postures are designed to energise us, others are designed to calm us down. No matter if you are a newbie or an old hat to inversions this class will be fun, will get you sweating and see the world from another perspective -upside down.

sessions.details: Yin yoga uses long-held relaxed floor postures to stimulate, stretch and nourish body and mind - in particular, the deep, connective tissues of the body. The aim of yin yoga is to create a free-flow of energy (‘chi’ or, in Indian yoga tradition, ‘prana’) through the body. sessions.title: HATHA FLOW
sessions.details: A slow-paced yet strong yoga practice that merges the longer postures of Hatha with the love for creative sequencing and breath of vinyasa (Anusara inspired), injecting philosophy themes, mindfulness, pranayama and mantras. To remind us that the space of Yoga is a supportive container. One that cultivates awareness, embodied strength, and a steady return to the present moment.

sessions.title: LATIN-FUSION DANCE
sessions.details: A joyful, high-energy class blending Latin dance styles with contemporary movement and expressive flow. In this 60-minute session, you’ll explore rhythm, musicality, and full-body movement through accessible choreography and playful combinations. Open to all levels, the class offers options and variations so you can move at your own pace—whether you’re new to dance or looking to deepen your groove. Expect a supportive atmosphere, a good sweat, and plenty of space to connect with the music, your body, and the joy of movement. No partner needed. Come as you are, leave energised and inspired.

sessions.title: Spring Equinox: Exploring Equanimity
sessions.details: The Spring Equinox in the northern hemisphere signals the balance between day and night - leaving the winter behind and move fully towards spring. The practice will explore how we find balance while letting go of the past and planting seeds for the future. The workshop will weave meditation, yoga, writing/creative expression and sound as tools for to navigate between endings and new beginnings *** £25 Early Bird price before 14th March

sessions.title: DYNAMIC VINYASA
sessions.details: Dynamic Vinyasa flow yoga is a dynamic practice rooted in Ashtanga yoga principles, where poses are link together to form one fluid sequence of movement. sessions.title: Couples Massage Workshop
sessions.details: Massage is one of the most heartfelt ways to show care, a simple, meaningful way to connect through touch. Join us for a two-hour Couple’s Massage Workshop, designed for partners, friends, or family members who’d like to share a moment of relaxation and reconnection. You’ll learn gentle, soothing techniques, how to create a calming atmosphere, and ways to communicate through mindful touch for a deeply restorative experience. Fully clothed and performed on the floor, this practice is easy to recreate at home — with optional oils for extra comfort. The session is pregnancy-friendly and suitable for all levels. **Please note: this workshop is for personal enrichment and does not provide professional certification. One ticket per person is required.

Benefits include cardiovascular health, strength building, a wide range of motion, stress relief, flexibility and connection with breath.   Expect to move from pose to pose in a creative sequence that changes every time, and often with a musical background. Some classes will be more vigorous and challenging than others depending on the teacher, who each bring their own influences, so do try them all or contact us for guidance.

sessions.title: ProDance class with Jule & Flor
sessions.details: The class will consist of a warm up focusing on softly waking up the whole body. We will use mobilisation, strength and stretching exercises to connect to ourselves, our bodies and each other and to prepare for the day ahead. After the warm up we will dive into guided improvisations based on our creation ‘Murmuration’. These include dancing in contact, exploring touch, walking and running. For this part we will both work in pairs and together as a whole group. Towards the end of the class we will teach a little repertoire.

sessions.title: DYNAMIC VINYASA
sessions.details: Dynamic Vinyasa flow yoga is a dynamic practice rooted in Ashtanga yoga principles, where poses are link together to form one fluid sequence of movement. Benefits include cardiovascular health, strength building, a wide range of motion, stress relief, flexibility and connection with breath. Expect to move from pose to pose in a creative sequence that changes every time, and often with a musical background. Some classes will be more vigorous and challenging than others depending on the teacher, who each bring their own influences, so do try them all or contact us for guidance.

sessions.title: VINYASA FLOW
sessions.details: Vinyasa flow yoga is a dynamic practice rooted in Ashtanga yoga principles, where poses are linked together to form one fluid sequence of movement. Benefits include cardiovascular health, strength building, a wide range of motion, stress relief, flexibility and connection with breath.   Expect to move from pose to pose in a creative sequence that changes every time, and often with a musical background. Some classes will be more vigorous and challenging than others depending on the teacher, who each bring their own influences, so do try them all or contact us for guidance.

sessions.title: YANG TO YIN
sessions.details: This class will flow through the energies of Yang into Yin. The first half will be focused on dynamic vinyasa-style asana to connect with and work the physical body through strong postures, an awareness of breath, a deep connection to sensation and body-mindfulness. The second half is designed to stimulate the parasympathetic nervous system with long floor-based postures, supported by meditation and mindfulness techniques to calm, ground and reset.

sessions.title: VINYASA
sessions.details: This Vinyasa Yoga class offers a dynamic, breath-led practice that builds strength, mobility and ease in the body. Movement flows smoothly from one posture to the next, linking breath with mindful transitions to create a continuous, energising sequence. Expect a balanced mix of standing postures, core work, creative sequencing and grounding stretches, with options offered to support different levels of experience. Classes may vary in pace and intensity, inviting both challenge and softness, while encouraging awareness, presence and connection. Suitable for those with some experience of yoga, as well as confident beginners looking to explore a flowing practice, this class leaves you feeling centred, uplifted and reconnected, both on and off the mat.

sessions.title: ProDance class with Jule & Flor
sessions.details: The class will consist of a warm up focusing on softly waking up the whole body. We will use mobilisation, strength and stretching exercises to connect to ourselves, our bodies and each other and to prepare for the day ahead. After the warm up we will dive into guided improvisations based on our creation ‘Murmuration’. These include dancing in contact, exploring touch, walking and running. For this part we will both work in pairs and together as a whole group. Towards the end of the class we will teach a little repertoire.

sessions.title: BAMBU BODIES
sessions.details: Bambu Bodies is a mixed movement class inspired by the Capoeira practice. The class begins with a set sequence to help with conditioning before moving onto movement inquiries involving anything from floorwork and rhythm, to partner-work, to proprioceptive tasks and practices, developing strength, mobility, and co-ordination on the way.

sessions.title: VINYASA FLOW
sessions.details: Vinyasa flow yoga is a dynamic practice rooted in Ashtanga yoga principles, where poses are linked together to form one fluid sequence of movement. Benefits include cardiovascular health, strength building, a wide range of motion, stress relief, flexibility and connection with breath.   Expect to move from pose to pose in a creative sequence that changes every time, and often with a musical background. Some classes will be more vigorous and challenging than others depending on the teacher, who each bring their own influences, so do try them all or contact us for guidance.

sessions.title: ROCKET
sessions.details: Rocket is deeply rooted in Ashtanga. It is a series of standing, balancing and inverted postures all linked by vinyasas (movement flows), incorporating basic poses with challenging arm balances, inversions and back bends Inversions are lot of fun, but they also prove to be some of the most challenging postures. Some of the upside down postures are designed to energise us, others are designed to calm us down. No matter if you are a newbie or an old hat to inversions this class will be fun, will get you sweating and see the world from another perspective -upside down.

sessions.title: FREE YOGA TEACHER TRAINING '26 - Q&A SESSION
sessions.details: Curious about our Yoga Teacher Training course? Ready to explore the ever-evolving, beautifully layered tradition of yoga? Want to deepen your understanding and refine your practice? If you’re hesitating—or simply want to learn more about our YTT—join TripSpace founder Giuliana Majo and lead teachers Ann Pidcock and Roberto Rubalcava for a FREE Q&A session, including a complimentary in-person class. This is your chance to ask questions, feel the energy, and dip your toes into this transformative journey. At the end, you’ll have the opportunity to book a FREE class with one of our lead teachers and experience the vibes firsthand.

sessions.title: YIN & MEDITATION
sessions.details: Yin yoga uses long-held relaxed floor postures to stimulate, stretch and nourish body and mind - in particular, the deep, connective tissues of the body. It is a quiet, yet profound practice and derives from theories contained in Chinese medicine and Taoism. These theories have parallels with other yoga traditions. The aim of yin yoga is to create a free-flow of energy (‘chi’ or, in Indian yoga tradition, ‘prana’) through the body. The body’s deep tissues carry most of our fluid systems and by stimulating them and creating spaciousness around them with sustained yoga postures we improve the function of all our fundamental systems. Gradual and sustained lengthening throughout the body's joints and tissues improves the circulation, respiration, detoxification and benefits both mobility and agility. Yin practice focuses on ‘stillness’ in holding poses to achieve these physical benefits but also invites the mind to ease and tune-in with deeper awareness to the subtle shifts of energy experienced as the body tissues release. This can be a very rewarding and energizing process!

sessions.title: VINYASA FLOW
sessions.details: Vinyasa flow yoga is a dynamic practice rooted in Ashtanga yoga principles, where poses are linked together to form one fluid sequence of movement. Some classes will be more vigorous and challenging than others depending on the teacher, who each bring their own influences, so do try them all or contact us for guidance.

sessions.title: HATHA FLOW
sessions.details: A slow-paced yet strong yoga practice that merges the longer postures of Hatha with the love for creative sequencing and breath of vinyasa (Anusara inspired), injecting philosophy themes, mindfulness, pranayama and mantras. To remind us that the space of Yoga is a supportive container. One that cultivates awareness, embodied strength, and a steady return to the present moment.

sessions.title: DYNAMIC VINYASA

sessions.title: LATIN-FUSION DANCE
sessions.details: A joyful, high-energy class blending Latin dance styles with contemporary movement and expressive flow. In this 60-minute session, you’ll explore rhythm, musicality, and full-body movement through accessible choreography and playful combinations. Open to all levels, the class offers options and variations so you can move at your own pace—whether you’re new to dance or looking to deepen your groove. Expect a supportive atmosphere, a good sweat, and plenty of space to connect with the music, your body, and the joy of movement. No partner needed. Come as you are, leave energised and inspired.

sessions.title: DYNAMIC VINYASA
sessions.details: Dynamic Vinyasa flow yoga is a dynamic practice rooted in Ashtanga yoga principles, where poses are link together to form one fluid sequence of movement. sessions.title: PHYSIO YOGA - PAY WHAT YOU CAN
sessions.details: This class is a movement meditation weaving principles of strength, motor control and proprioceptive training into intelligent yoga sequencing. Every month we will focus on a different region of the body combining sound anatomical knowledge & mindful practice to achieve efficient & graceful movement. Each vibrant flow is thoughtfully composed to allow for progressions, alternatives and modifications to promote health, wellbeing and a sense of vitality for all participants. No experience needed, all welcome.

sessions.title: VINYASA FLOW
sessions.details: Vinyasa flow yoga is a dynamic practice rooted in Ashtanga yoga principles, where poses are linked together to form one fluid sequence of movement. Benefits include cardiovascular health, strength building, a wide range of motion, stress relief, flexibility and connection with breath.   Expect to move from pose to pose in a creative sequence that changes every time, and often with a musical background. sessions.title: PILATES FLOW
sessions.details: Pilates Flow is a dynamic blend of Pilates, mobility exercises, and yoga flow sequences, all synchronized with the breath. This class aims to enhance strength, flexibility, and overall body awareness, providing a holistic workout that leaves you feeling balanced and revitalized.

sessions.title: YOGA for over 50s
sessions.details: Classes involve simple sequences of movements aiming at building strength and balance while keeping you connected to breath and intention.

sessions.title: FLOW & GONG
sessions.details: The ultimate way to flow, relax, and glow. First stretch out and strengthen up with a dynamic vinyasa practice that links breath to movement, and really gets you moving. Inspired on rocket yoga, sequences are energising, inspiring, sometimes hilarious – and with optional balances & inversions to get the heart pumping. Next the pace drops as you move into deeper, more restorative poses and calming breathwork – before full sensory submersion in a 30-minute gong bath. Lie back and let the healing vibrations lead you into a state of contemplation, relaxation, and positivity. You'll leave glowing for sure!

sessions.title: CONTEMPORARY DANCE
sessions.details: Nicola’s teaching philosophy centers on fostering an inclusive, safe space for students to explore their creativity and connect with others. She emphasizes presence, adaptability, and self-expression while encouraging students to embrace challenges and build confidence in their artistry. Through her classes, Nicola seeks to inspire boldness, community, and joy in movement. This all-level class invites participants to explore movement improvisation, flow, and groove. Structured exercises and physical sequences focus on bold, dynamic choices and artistry, blending elements of soft acrobatics, floorwork, classical dance techniques, and yoga.

sessions.title: VINYASA FLOW
sessions.details: Vinyasa flow yoga is a dynamic practice rooted in Ashtanga yoga principles, where poses are linked together to form one fluid sequence of movement. Benefits include cardiovascular health, strength building, a wide range of motion, stress relief, flexibility and connection with breath.   Expect to move from pose to pose in a creative sequence that changes every time, and often with a musical background. Some classes will be more vigorous and challenging than others depending on the teacher, who each bring their own influences, so do try them all or contact us for guidance.

sessions.title: VINYASA FLOW 90
sessions.details: Ann has been teaching a soft, creative style of Vinyasa Flow across London for over 10 years. Her original teacher training was 500 hours BWY with Danny DeVille. She has since sought out wisdom from many wonderful teachers- including Jason Crandell adding texture and depth to this foundation. Her interest in how the body moves is largely influenced by her work in dance, whereas the breathing, asana and esoteric elements stem from her education in Yoga and its rich history of ideas and styles.

sessions.title: PREGNANCY VINYASA FLOW
sessions.details: This class is an active yoga practice for mums-to-be throughout their second and third trimesters. The poses are safely adapted to encourage strength, flexibility, balance and ease. The class has a steady pace with plenty of options for all levels of experience and also includes breathing techniques and deep relaxation, both of which are so vital to support and nourish the mother and growing baby. *Please note that you need to be 13 weeks pregnant to begin the classes.

sessions.title: Flying Low
sessions.details: Developed by David Zambrano, Flying Low is a floorwork technique that teaches smooth transitions into and out of the floor using spirals, sliding, and fluid sequences. It builds the foundation for effortless connection between the body and its surroundings—integral to the art of Passing Through.
